calendar.matters:
REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AGAINST DEFENDANT ANTONIO RAMIREZ AND DEFENDANT RAMIREZ ROOFING.
Off Calendar Jun-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:13 am, pausing at 9:25 am, resuming at 11:04 am and concluding at 11:24 am.

Plaintiff Svetlana Zhurenkova is present in pro per, placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Antoinio Ramirez is not present.
Defendant Ramirez Roofing is not present.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Bill for waste disposal......................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Loss of Rent Statment........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Estimate for roof repair.....................ID/EVID

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Svetlana Zhurenkova, and against Defendant Antoinio Ramirez, and Ramirez Roofing as follows:

1. Damages: $267,000.00
2. Intrest: $0.00
3. Costs: $0.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $267,000.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AGAINST DEFENDANT ANTONIO RAMIREZ AND DEFENDANT RAMIREZ ROOFING.
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Continued To Jun-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Reinstate Case And Motion For Order
Off Calendar Mar-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for motion to set aside dismissal.

Dept.505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:29:08 a.m. and concluding at 9:35:58 a.m. (D505)

Plaintiff Svetlana Zhurenkova appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Motion to set aside default filed February 15, 2024.
Notice of Motion to set aside default filed February 26, 2024.

Plaintiff testifies that it was her mistake and was waiting for notice from the Court and got confused with the hearing dates.

The Court finds that the Plaintiff's testimony is credible.

The Court grants Plaintiff's request to set aside the dismissal ordered on January 31, 2024.

Order signed and executed this day.

Plaintiff stipulates to the hearing date for the motion for request for default judgment.

Court and plaintiff discuss how exhibits are to be presented. It would be helpful to the Court if plaintiff can list down exhibits in a spreadsheet. Court provides examples.

The motion for default judgment is reset for May 8, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505.

Notice sent by the court.
